decisions.decision: HighlightSwift geselecteerd boven tree-sitter (eenvoudiger, voldoende voor read-only display)
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Hybrid approach: HighlightSwift primary, regex fallback
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Added `import AppKit` to ANSIStyler for SyntaxHighlightingService type support
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Removed invalid `anchorsMatchLines` option from regex replacements (not available in NSString.CompareOptions)
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Used synchronous highlighting (`highlightSync`) for current use cases - async available for future optimization
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Visual indicators (✓/⚡) implemented in language labels to show users which highlighting engine was used
decisions.author: frontend-morty
